packet_node(3) Library Functions Manual packet_node(3)

NAME

packet_node - Node in the packet queue linked list.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/packet/queue.h>

Data Fields


queued_packet_t packet
The queued packet data. atomic_ptr_t next
Pointer to next node in linked list (NULL for tail) - atomic for lock-free operations.

Detailed Description

Node in the packet queue linked list.

Linked list node containing a queued packet and pointer to next node. Nodes are allocated from a pool to reduce malloc/free overhead.

Definition at line 147 of file queue.h.
